title: New layoffs at Xbox affect The Elder Scrolls Online leadership team and raise doubts about its future
summary: A new wave of cuts at ZeniMax Online Studios, confirmed by multiple sources, leaves the MMO in a situation of uncertainty after losing much of its leadership.

title: GTA 6 will arrive first on consoles and a price above 100 dollars is speculated
summary: Former Rockstar developers justify the PC delay while analysts predict record sales of over 5 billion dollars in the first week.

title: EA sees a 'great opportunity' in in-game advertising
summary: Company executives defend the early integration of advertising in games as a key revenue source for the future of the industry.

title: Hasbro and Nintendo team up to create a line of The Legend of Zelda toys
summary: The new products will accompany the launch of the long-awaited live-action film and Nintendo's promotional campaign.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced generates millions in DLC despite player criticism
summary: Ubisoft defends its additional content and New Game+ strategy while releasing patches that improve gameplay and fix bugs.

title: Square Enix releases new and spectacular trailers for Final Fantasy Resonance
summary: The 'Pixel' and cinematic trailers show the artistic style and gameplay of the long-awaited RPG before its release on Nintendo Switch.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 presents its new multiplayer mode and faces GTA 6
summary: Infinity Ward boasts about the Kill Block mode and defends its commitment to immersion, while the community debates the end of keyboard and mouse.

title: The long-awaited roguelite PvE mode of Marathon will only be available for two weeks
summary: Bungie promises a larger PvE mode for autumn, but the community criticizes the limited duration of the experimental launch content.

title: Forza Horizon 6 expands with Italian cars and new exploration regions
summary: The update adds the Italian dealership, the Shikisai-no-Oka and Nangan areas, and prepares a reset of the leaderboards.

title: Crunchyroll receives harsh criticism for limiting the sale of physical anime products
summary: Fans call for a boycott against the Sony platform after removing its store and putting merchandise behind a paywall.

title: Warner Bros. will shut down the mobile game Looney Tunes: World of Mayhem in October 2026
summary: The popular free-to-play based on Looney Tunes characters will be permanently discontinued after several years of operation.

title: An ingenious system allows creating physical cartridges for Steam games using SSDs
summary: A user shares their method to give a tangible presence to their digital PC library through functional homemade cartridges.

title: Former id Software employees warn that the id Tech engine could be abandoned by Microsoft
summary: Conflicting reports surround the future of the engine, with internal sources stating that the team has been laid off and games would migrate to Unreal Engine.

title: CD Projekt RED veterans warn of the risks of making the The Witcher remake an open world
summary: Original developers of the first game express their doubts about the open-world conversion and the possible impact on the quality of the experience.

title: Christopher Nolan's Odyssey sweeps Rotten Tomatoes with 96% positive reviews
summary: The epic starring Matt Damon is hailed as a visual masterpiece while the Halo series director joins the Odysseus spin-off series.

title: Physical editions of Mortal Shell 2 sell out in pre-order and players point to Sony
summary: The success of the souls-like in physical format demonstrates the persistent demand for boxed releases for the current generation of consoles.

title: Palworld, the 'Pokémon with guns', becomes the most played game on Steam again
summary: The controversial survival and creature-capturing title reaches a new peak of popularity on Valve's platform while new game guides appear.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 surpasses 6 million consoles sold in Japan according to Famitsu
summary: The latest weekly sales data in Japan confirms the commercial milestone achieved by Nintendo's new console in the Japanese market.

title: Fortnite debuts new sprites and swimsuit skins in Chapter 7 Season 3
summary: The mid-season update introduces a large amount of new cosmetic content and challenges for battle royale players.

title: The GTA 6 leaker leaves the hospital and stirs from prison while awaiting a new trial
summary: The well-known hacker, indefinitely sentenced for leaking game material, makes news again after a long hospitalization.
